prompt: Create a realistic wide-angle smartphone photo in a modern high-rise hotel room, shot from floor level beside a person lying flat on a patterned carpet. The person is wearing cream white long-sleeve loungewear and matching pants, stretched horizontally across the frame with their head resting on a white pillow at the right side. Their face is intentionally obscured by a solid rectangular blur in a natural skin-tone color. One bare foot is raised prominently in the foreground near the upper left-center, toes gripping a black smartphone as if attempting a foot-held selfie; the phone has a glossy black case and multiple rear camera lenses facing the viewer. The other leg remains extended along the floor. Show exactly one visible raised foot, one black phone, one pillow, one bed on the left with rumpled white bedding, one gray lounge chair near the window, and large floor-to-ceiling windows revealing a bright daytime city skyline of tall apartment towers. Use warm sunlight streaming through the windows, casting strong angular shadows across the beige and blue carpet. The perspective should feel awkward and experimental, like a failed selfie attempt taken from the ground, with slight wide-angle distortion, natural indoor lighting, realistic textures, and no added text or watermark. The setting is a luxury hotel bedroom, the phone model appearance is black triple-camera smartphone, and the view outside is dense modern city skyline.
